detail.description: Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Matt Wallner doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango. Kody Clemens scores.
Matt Wallner singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter. Josh Bell to 2nd.
Matt Wallner doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Kerry Carpenter. Victor Caratini scores. Josh Bell to 3rd.
Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to center fielder Parker Meadows. Ryan Jeffers to 2nd.
Matt Wallner doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Jahmai Jones.
Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to right fielder Zach McKinstry. Trevor Larnach scores. Luke Keaschall to 3rd.
Rays challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Matt Wallner singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Griffin Jax, deflected by first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Matt Wallner homers (3) on a fly ball to right field.
Matt Wallner singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Matt Wallner homers (2) on a line drive to left center field.
Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel.
Matt Wallner homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field.
Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to center fielder Luis Robert Jr.
Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to left fielder Carson Benge.
Matt Wallner homers (4) on a fly ball to center field.
Matt Wallner singles on a ground ball to right fielder James Wood. Luke Keaschall scores.
Matt Wallner singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jonny DeLuca.
Matt Wallner singles on a line drive to center fielder Dylan Beavers.
Matt Wallner singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Trevor Larnach scores. Luke Keaschall to 3rd. Josh Bell to 2nd.
